message:
feat(lab): CaptureManifest field provenance and LiveWitnessCollector manifest tracking

Extend the dual-run infrastructure with explicit capture provenance
so mismatch reports can show exactly how each field was obtained.

CaptureManifest:
- Per-field provenance tracking with FieldCaptureStatus:
  Observed(source), Inferred(source), Unsupported(reason),
  NotCaptured(reason)
- new(), observed(), inferred(), unsupported(), not_captured() builders
- describe_field_capture() for human-readable provenance lookup
- observed_fields()/inferred_fields() for audit enumeration

ComparisonVerdict:
- summary_with_manifests() formats mismatch report augmented with
  lab/live capture provenance per mismatched field

LiveWitnessCollector:
- Gains manifest: CaptureManifest initialized with default provenance
  for all semantic fields (terminal_outcome, cancellation, loser_drain,
  region_close, obligation_balance, resource_surface)
- record_*() methods update manifest status from Inferred to Observed
  as evidence arrives
- manifest() accessor for downstream reporting

DualRunHarness:
- Propagates capture manifests through comparison pipeline

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
